name: Step-Up SIP Calculator
description: Model SIPs with periodic increase in contributions.

example.explanation: Starting with ₹5,000 and increasing by 10% yearly at 12% returns over 10 years grows to ₹16,24,622.

faqs.question: What is step-up SIP?
faqs.answer: It increases your monthly investment periodically to keep pace with rising income.

faqs.question: How is it different from regular SIP?
faqs.answer: Regular SIP keeps contributions constant while step-up SIP increases them over time.

faqs.question: When should I use step-up SIP?
faqs.answer: Use it if you expect your income to grow over time and want to invest additional savings.
